scenarios.goal: explain how checkout auth flow works without editing code
scenarios.reason: Read-only code questions should use the turn-based explanation loop.

scenarios.goal: make one small copy edit and verify lint still passes
scenarios.reason: One scoped edit with one verifier should use small edit verification.

scenarios.goal: review this diff for risky changes before merge
scenarios.reason: A one-shot review of existing changes should use the diff review pass.

scenarios.goal: explain this TypeError stack trace and identify the likely fix
scenarios.reason: One stack trace with unknown cause should use the error explanation loop.

scenarios.goal: tighten confusing button copy on the onboarding screen
scenarios.reason: Focused UI wording work should use the copy clarity loop.

scenarios.goal: inspect this repo and run the right loop
scenarios.reason: Broad repo inspection should route to intake before execution.

scenarios.goal: fix failing CI typecheck job
scenarios.reason: A named failing check should use the failing CI repair loop.

scenarios.goal: fix bug where checkout redirects to the wrong page
scenarios.reason: Concrete wrong behavior with expected behavior should use the bug-fix loop.

scenarios.goal: sanitize unsafe user input before saving it
scenarios.reason: A concrete input validation risk should use security hardening.

scenarios.goal: publish npm package after final release checks
scenarios.reason: Publishing and final release checks should use release readiness.

scenarios.goal: watch my PR every 10 minutes and address new review comments
scenarios.reason: Interval PR comment polling is time-based.

scenarios.goal: check CI every 5 minutes until the branch is green
scenarios.reason: Polling CI until green is time-based.

scenarios.goal: run a daily dependency update check and report advisories
scenarios.reason: Scheduled dependency checks should use dependency watch.

scenarios.goal: check docs once a week for stale install commands
scenarios.reason: Recurring docs drift checks should use docs freshness watch.

scenarios.goal: run production smoke every morning and report failures
scenarios.reason: Scheduled public smoke checks should use production smoke watch.

scenarios.goal: triage incoming bug reports from the issue queue and route them
scenarios.reason: Event-driven bug queue handling should use incoming bug triage.

scenarios.goal: proactively process dependency upgrade tickets as they arrive
scenarios.reason: Live dependency queue handling should use the proactive queue routine.

scenarios.goal: automatically resolve new PR review comments and request review
scenarios.reason: Event-triggered review comment resolution is proactive.

scenarios.goal: turn customer feedback messages into fixes or tickets automatically
scenarios.reason: Feedback queue routing should use the proactive feedback routine.

scenarios.goal: run a weekly code health routine and open small cleanup PRs
scenarios.reason: Recurring code-health work should use the proactive maintenance routine.

scenarios.goal: add regression tests for an uncovered checkout edge case
scenarios.reason: Focused test coverage is a scoped one-turn edit when no failing command is supplied.

scenarios.goal: security review finding for auth bypass
scenarios.reason: A concrete auth bypass finding should route to security hardening.

scenarios.goal: fix stale installed skill copies
scenarios.reason: Install-surface drift before publishing should route to release readiness.

scenarios.goal: find the next actionable issue in this codebase
scenarios.reason: A broad next-issue request should use intake rather than guessing a fix loop.
